text: 4 CloudFront Signed URLs vs Cookies @umunanis @ s | * SignedURLSs provides access to one object @Iistorically RTMP distributions couldn't use cookies e Use URL's if your client doesn’t support cookies e Cookies provides access to groups of objects -i— ¢ Use for groups of files/all files of a type - e.g. all cat gifs ¢ Or if maintaining application URL's is important
